reviews.review_description: Great casual puzzler - suitable for players of all ages and perfect for those new to VR. Big thanks to the dev for providing 5 codes to giveaway in my best of App Lab video: https://youtu.be/ZNFV4r8MAYw

reviews.review_title: Be Santa's Little Helper in VR
reviews.review_description:
Help Santa Clause fill his sleigh for all the good boys and girls in vr. The game is simple and brings some good holiday cheer to your heart. Santa needs help getting his sleigh all ready for Christmas day and the elves don't wanna do it. Your job is to build toys and make sure they get wrapped and into the sleigh. I had fun and enjoyed how simple the game is. It would be a great experience for anyone just starting out in VR!

Full Review here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=a8B3JNeF_88

reviews.review_title: Absolutely amazing, but I gotta say...
reviews.review_description:
Two years ago, I thought to myself, 'What I would like is some kind of Santa's Workshop VR game where you could make preasents and box them up!' And when I saw this on SideQuest, I was like... 'Okay, did these people read my thoughts or something??' This is an amazing game.
Definatly worth the money, and just in time to play right before Christmas.
Helping Santa in VR is just really precious! Still though, I'm looking forward to future updates to the game if that will happen.

All in all, the game is truly festive, a good chance to meet Santa and also a good chance to help him with presents and toys. Thank you so much!

Keep up the good work with VR game making...if possible that is!

**If you would like a discount code, please PM me the name of this game & I'll send you a code ASAP**

I absolutely loved this cute game!! It was perfect for Christmas, but it would be fun any time of year.  

Some of what you have to do takes some real searching!!!!! I was completely stuck, at one point, but finally got it. I love that it challenged me :)
I highly recommend this game if you are a starter. It is fun and creative. You should definitely try it!
This is such a nice game for all ages. I can't wait for my kids and grandkids to play.  Something fun and different for the holidays!
This game is good for those who are just starting to play VR games.
This is a pretty good game if you’re just starting VR games. But after you finish the game there’s not really anything to do.
Your game is fantastic! I love the idea to be like an elf who helps Santa prepare presents. Keep it up!
This game is very fun! Amazing game for beginners to VR. Very immersive and fun for all ages.
Dear Santa VR is perfect for those who like calm measured gameplay with picking up and searching for items. Overall, a well made VR which is a must buy.
One of the most fun games on VR and it is just a relaxing game and fun.
